languages.text: {n}То, что Тервантьяс оставил от Эоганна, больше напоминает жалкий огрызок, чем живое существо. Из черепа {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножреца{/g} грубо вырвана большая часть {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментов{/g}, и разошедшиеся края изодранного скальпа открывают влажно блестящую кость. Все, что ниже подбородка, отсутствует — остался лишь сегмент аугментированного позвоночника, похожий на окровавленный штырь с подключенными к нему проводами и трубками.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}То, что Тервантьяс оставил от Эо-ганна, больше напоминает жалкий огрызок, чем живое существо. Из черепа {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножреца{/g} грубо вырвана большая часть {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментов{/g}, и разошедшиеся края изодранного скальпа открывают влажно блестящую кость. Все, что ниже подбородка, отсутствует — остался лишь сегмент аугментированного позвоночника, похожий на окровавленный штекер с подключенными к нему проводами и трубками.{/n}
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: {n}What Tervantias has left of Eogunn is a pitiful scrap of a still-living creature. Most of the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been roughly torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal glistening white bone. Everything below the chin is gone — nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloody spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}То, что Тервантьяс оставил от Эоганна, больше напоминает жалкий огрызок, чем живое существо. Из черепа {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}техножреца{/g} грубо вырвана большая часть {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментов{/g}, и разошедшиеся края изодранного скальпа открывают влажно блестящую кость. Все, что ниже подбородка, отсутствует — остался лишь сегмент аугментированного позвоночника, похожий на окровавленный штырь с подключенными к нему проводами и трубками.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}What Tervantias has left of Eogunn is a pitiful scrap of a living being. Most of the Tech-Priest's {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been crudely torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal moist and shiny bone. Everything below the chin is gone, nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloodied spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}

Everything below the chin is gone, nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloodied spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}

Most of the Tech-Priest's {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been roughly torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal glistening white bone. Everything below the chin is gone — nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloody spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tervantias hat von Eogunn nur den erbärmlichen Rest einer Kreatur zurückgelassen. Die meisten {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} wurden dem {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Techpriester{/g} brutal aus dem Schädel gerissen, und tiefe Wunden an seinem geschundenen Kopf geben den Blick auf weiße Knochen frei. Alles unter dem Kinn ist weg — alles, bis auf ein Segment eines augmentierten Rückgrates, das wie ein blutiger Stachel wirkt, um den sich Kabel und Röhren schlängeln.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}What Tervantias has left of Eogunn is a pitiful scrap of a still-living creature. Most of the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been roughly torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal glistening white bone. Everything below the chin is gone — nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloody spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias hat von Eogunn nur den erbärmlichen Rest einer Kreatur zurückgelassen. Die meisten {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} wurden dem Techpriester brutal aus dem Schädel gerissen, und tiefe Wunden an seinem geschundenen Kopf geben den Blick auf weiße Knochen frei. Alles unter dem Kinn ist weg — alles, bis auf ein Segment eines augmentierten Rückgrates, das wie ein blutiger Stachel wirkt, um den sich Kabel und Röhren schlängeln.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tervantias a réduit Eogunn à un misérable tas de chair à moitié mort. La plupart des {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} du {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}technoprêtre{/g} lui ont été arrachées sans ménagement, et les déchirures qui strient son crâne laissent entrevoir de l'os d'un blanc brillant. Tout ce qui se trouvait sous son menton a disparu, hormis une partie de sa colonne vertébrale augmentée, qui gît telle une arête sanglante faite de câbles et de tubes.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}What Tervantias has left of Eogunn is a pitiful scrap of a still-living creature. Most of the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been roughly torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal glistening white bone. Everything below the chin is gone — nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloody spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias a réduit Eogunn à un misérable tas de chair à moitié mort. La plupart des {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentations{/g} du technoprêtre lui ont été arrachées sans ménagement, et les déchirures qui strient son crâne laissent entrevoir de l'os d'un blanc brillant. Tout ce qui se trouvait sous son menton a disparu, hormis une partie de sa colonne vertébrale augmentée, qui gît telle une arête sanglante faite de câbles et de tubes.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tervantias ha reducido a Eogunn a un lamentable despojo que aún vive. Muchos de los {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumentos{/g} del {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}tecnosacerdote{/g} han sido arrancados de su cráneo, y los bordes serrados de su cabellera dejan hueso al descubierto. No queda nada por debajo de la barbilla, excepto una pequeña sección de médula espinal aumentada que parece una espina sangrienta de la que brotan cables y tubos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}What Tervantias has left of Eogunn is a pitiful scrap of a still-living creature. Most of the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been roughly torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal glistening white bone. Everything below the chin is gone — nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloody spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias ha reducido a Eogunn a un lamentable despojo que aún vive. Muchos de los {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumentos{/g} del tecnosacerdote han sido arrancados de su cráneo, y los bordes serrados de su cabellera dejan hueso al descubierto. No queda nada por debajo de la barbilla, excepto una pequeña sección de médula espinal aumentada que parece una espina sangrienta de la que brotan cables y tubos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tervantias'ın Eogunn'dan geriye bıraktığı şey, hâlâ yaşayan bir yaratığın acınası bir parçası. {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tekno Rahip{/g}'in {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmetiklerinin{/g} çoğu, kafatasından kabaca sökülmüş. Parçalanmış kafa derisinin pürüzlü kenarları, parlayan beyaz kemiği ortaya çıkarıyor. Çenenin altındaki her şey gitmiş... Teller ve tüplerin kıvrıldığı kanlı bir dikeni andıran ogmentli bir omurga parçasından başka hiçbir şey kalmamış.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}What Tervantias has left of Eogunn is a pitiful scrap of a still-living creature. Most of the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been roughly torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal glistening white bone. Everything below the chin is gone — nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloody spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias'ın Eogunn'dan geriye bıraktığı şey, hâlâ yaşayan bir yaratığın acınası bir parçası. Tekno Rahip'in {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmetiklerinin{/g} çoğu, kafatasından kabaca sökülmüş. Parçalanmış kafa derisinin pürüzlü kenarları, parlayan beyaz kemiği ortaya çıkarıyor. Çenenin altındaki her şey gitmiş... Teller ve tüplerin kıvrıldığı kanlı bir dikeni andıran ogmentli bir omurga parçasından başka hiçbir şey kalmamış.{/n}

languages.text: {n}特万提亚斯留给伊奥贡的，只是一小团尚存一息的可怜残躯。这位{g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}技术神甫{/g}头骨上的大部分{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}已被粗暴地撕扯下来，破烂的头皮边缘露出白森森的骨头。下巴以下荡然无存，只剩一截加装了植入物的脊椎，像一根血淋淋的尖刺，上面还缠绕着电线和导管。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}What Tervantias has left of Eogunn is a pitiful scrap of a still-living creature. Most of the {g|Encyclopedia:TechPriest}Tech-Priest{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been roughly torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal glistening white bone. Everything below the chin is gone — nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloody spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}特万提亚斯留给伊奥贡的，只是一小团尚存一息的可怜残躯。这位技术神甫头骨上的大部分{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}已被粗暴地撕扯下来，破烂的头皮边缘露出白森森的骨头。下巴以下荡然无存，只剩一截加装了植入物的脊椎，像一根血淋淋的尖刺，上面还缠绕着电线和导管。{/n}

languages.text: {n}テルヴァンティアスがエオガンに残したのは、なおも生きている生き物の、哀れな切れ端だった。技術司祭の{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}オーグメティック{/g}の大半は頭蓋から乱暴にもぎ取られ、ずたずたに裂けた頭皮のぎざぎざの縁からは、つやめく白い骨がのぞいている。顎から下はすべて失われ――配線と管がのたうつように這い出た、血まみれの杭のような、増強された脊椎の一片のほかには、何も残っていない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}What Tervantias has left of Eogunn is a pitiful scrap of a still-living creature. Most of the Tech-Priest's {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augments{/g} have been roughly torn from his skull, and the ragged edges of his shredded scalp reveal glistening white bone. Everything below the chin is gone — nothing remains but a segment of augmented spine, resembling a bloody spike with wires and tubes snaking from it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}テルヴァンティアスがエオガンに残したのは、なおも生きている生き物の、哀れな切れ端だった。技術司祭の{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}オーグメティック{/g}の大半は頭蓋から乱暴にもぎ取られ、ずたずたに裂けた頭皮のぎざぎざの縁からは、つやめく白い骨がのぞいている。顎から下はすべて失われ――配線と管がのたうつように這い出た、血まみれの杭のような、増強された脊椎の一片のほかには、何も残っていない。{/n}
